campaign.name: Final Comprehensive Test Campaign
campaign.description: Final numerical test campaign for Journal of Cleaner Production article

analysis_settings.description: Behavioral comparisons admit proven-optimal solutions and feasible incumbents with a final optimality gap no greater than this percentage
analysis_settings.scenario_interpretation: Simulation scenarios are controlled deterministic optimization scenarios, not Monte Carlo, stochastic demand, disruption, or dynamic execution simulations

scalability.description: BOM size sweep from 2 to 150 components

carbon_price_switching_threshold.description: Exploratory diagnostic for the EmisTax value at which the price-only operating point first changes

nlm_comparison.description: PLM vs NLM comparison for selected instances

decision_stability.description: Extremal near-optimal decision-degeneracy diagnostic around proven-optimal policy solutions
decision_stability.scope: Representative proven-optimal policy anchors only, to diagnose decision degeneracy without multiplying the full scenario sweep

cost.inventory_cost: Inventory holding costs at buffer positions
cost.carbon_cost: Monetized carbon cost (EmisTax in constant 2023 EUR/tCO2 * emissions in tCO2)

carbon.total_emissions: Total CO2 emissions (g; convert by 1e6 for tCO2)
carbon.supplier_emissions: Supplier-side emissions within the modeled boundary

inventory.DIO: Days inventory outstanding (sum of decoupled lead times)

ddmrp.decoupling_structure: Decoupled lead times at each node

computational.mip_gap: Final optimality gap in percent if non-zero
computational.comparison_admissible: True for proven-optimal solutions and feasible incumbents whose final optimality gap is at most 1%

decision_stability.buffer_jaccard_similarity: Jaccard similarity between reference and extremal near-optimal buffer-position sets
decision_stability.supplier_jaccard_similarity: Jaccard similarity between reference and extremal near-optimal supplier-selection pairs
decision_stability.allocation_l1_normalized: Absolute allocation deviation divided by total reference allocation
decision_stability.interpretation: Report continuous metrics only; do not assign stable/unstable classes without an externally justified tolerance threshold

baseline_references.description: Lexicographic baseline used for cap percentage calculations
baseline_references.method: Use CPLEX native staticLex(TotalCostCS, Emis) with EmisTax=0 and no cap, so economic cost is optimized first and supplier-side emissions are used as the internal tie-break objective.
